publicationStmt.p: This XML text (filename tlg2112024.xml) was generated by Diogenes (version 4.7.2) from the TLG corpus of classical texts (author number 2112, work number 024), which was once distributed on CD-ROM in a very different file format, and which may be subject to licensing restrictions.

sourceDesc.p: Amphilochius Scr. Eccl. (c. A.D. 4), Fragmentum xx [Sp.] (2112: 024); MPG 39.

div.p: Ὥσπερ τινὰς παιδαγωγοὺς ἢ παιδονόμους ἐπιτεταγμένους τοῖς ἀνθρώποις τοὺς ἀγγέλους ἰδὼν ὁ Ἀπόστολος, εἰς μαρτυρίαν ἐκάλεσεν.
